title: Bot Connect
description: ✨Group-connected robots based on Forge and Fabric✨
body:
✨ Based on OneBot protocol's MineCraft QQ Robot✨

### Introduction:
This mod depends on forge,it's different from those Bukkit plugins.\
The bot used a subject on Github:go-cqhttp.

### Commands:
- /mcbot connect <host> <port> <token> use address to connect go-cqhttp.
- /mcbot disconnect; disconnect from go-cqhttp.
- /mcbot receive <all|chat|cmd> <true|false>; enable to send messge to minecraft.
- /mcbot send <all|join|leave|death|achievements> <true|false>; enable to send message to QQ.
- /mcbot status; get the bot status.
- /mcbot setID; set the QQ group id which you want to connect

### Features:
This mod used websocket.\
View which player join and leave Minecraft in QQ.\
View the game tps and player list in QQ.
